sections.paragraph:
Original: היא הוּא

Transliteration: hû' hı̂y'

Phonetic: hoo

BDB Definition:

  1. he, she, it (pronoun third person singular)
    1. himself (with emphasis)
    2. resuming subject with emphasis
    3. (with minimum emphasis following predicate)
    4. (anticipating subject)
    5. (emphasizing predicate)
    6. that, it (neuter)
  2. that (with article) (demonstrative pronoun)

Origin: a primitive word

TWOT entry: 480

Part(s) of speech:
